event.title: 9th International Conference on Trends in Mechanical Engineering (MECE 2025) in Virtual Conference, Australia

body.p: 9th International Conference on Trends in Mechanical Engineering (MECE 2025) will provide an excellent international forum for sharing knowledge and results in theory, methodology and applications impacts and challenges of Mechanical Engineering. The conference documents practical and theoretical results which make a fundamental contribution for the development of Mechanical Engineering.
